mapper.sql: id, user_id, course_id, chapter_id, question_id, user_answer, is_correct, answer_duration, practice_mode, source_record_id, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_practice_record (user_id, course_id, chapter_id, question_id, user_answer, is_correct, answer_duration, practice_mode, source_record_id, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{courseId}, #{chapterId}, #{questionId}, #{userAnswer}, #{isCorrect}, #{answerDuration}, #{practiceMode}, #{sourceRecordId}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_practice_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM edu_practice_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND chapter_id = #{chapterId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM edu_practice_record WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_practice_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_practice_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND is_correct = 1 AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT question_id) FROM edu_practice_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND chapter_id = #{chapterId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_practice_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND chapter_id = #{chapterId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_practice_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND chapter_id = #{chapterId} AND is_correct = 1 AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_practice_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND question_id = #{questionId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM edu_practice_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND is_correct = 0 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT DISTINCT question_id FROM edu_practice_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND chapter_id = #{chapterId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT question_id FROM edu_practice_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND is_correct = 0 AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY question_id ORDER BY COUNT(1) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
